title: Assistant Store Manager - DMart - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - DMart - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
DMart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
